title: Brook Steals the Road Poneglyph Copy
description: On pages 14–16, this part focuses on Brook, Sanji, Big Mom as Sanji learns the truth about Pudding and Big Mom’s plan while the crew looks for a way out.
scene: The truth behind Pudding and Big Mom’s plan breaks Sanji’s hope, while the crew gathers critical information and allies.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Ah, here you are. The rubbing.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Anyway, as I was saying...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have been using a new blog for a while now and I am

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm glad to see that you, too, are alive!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We definitely were backed into a corner there! I couldn't think of anything other than a decoy plan, either...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait just a minute, brook... what are these? Don't tell me these pieces of paper...

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Huh? They're the rubbings of the poneglyph.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let me tell you, I only managed to get them by the skin of my teeth! The very moment I had finished rubbing the last one, big mom, of all people, showed up, and...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: So you actually had them ?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Even with her commanders there and everything?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The DoneGlyphs that the other yonkou want nothing more than to get their hands on?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You actually got them ?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Yeah.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What in the world?! He stole our DoneglypHS?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: WooooOW! Well done, brook! :)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Yoho?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So easily given entry into the Hall of Treasures! What a guy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Even family is not

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yohoho! Wait... so do you think you can show me your panties, then?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Befh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: That's one objective down!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now all we've got left to do is bring back Sanji!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: The rumble of hope!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Betrayal Revealed storyline with 24 dialogue beats. Pudding’s deception and Big Mom’s intentions become clear, changing the rescue from infiltration to survival.
